data.description: BUILDPLAN M2 / WS-7 (BUILDPLAN id MA-06). CI steps for cargo audit and npm audit --audit-level=high (accepted advisories allowlisted in-repo with a comment); .github/dependabot.yml covering cargo, npm, and github-actions ecosystems. ACs: AC-17, AC-18. Serialize: ci.yml. Size S.
data.title: Add supply-chain audits and Dependabot

data.body: Self-review verdict: PASS. Diff vs origin/main: 4 files. (1) ci.yml — rust job gains Install cargo-audit (taiki-e/install-action@v2, matching existing ast-grep install pin/style) + cargo audit placed pre-compile after toolchain+cache (cargo in PATH confirmed by step order); typescript job gains npm audit --audit-level=high after npm ci. Both steps are static commands, no untrusted-input interpolation. (2) .cargo/audit.toml — cargo-audit's default config path at repo root, empty ignore list, comment-per-entry rule documented (AC-17 allowlist mechanism). (3) .github/dependabot.yml — version 2, weekly, cargo /, npm /falcon-detective, github-actions / (AC-18). (4) falcon-detective/package-lock.json — npm audit fix, in-range transitive bumps only (fast-uri, hono, protobufjs, ws + minors), package.json untouched; high gate now exits 0 locally; fast suite 48/48 green. G-1 intact: no falcon-agent file touched; ci.yml comment pins allowlist-only response for any falcon-agent advisory. Residual risks flagged: (a) cargo-audit not runnable locally — first CI run proves the Rust gate and could surface RustSec advisories in Cargo.lock; (b) one low esbuild advisory remains, below the high gate, dev-only. No nits requiring change.
PR open: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/39 (branch claude/ma-6-supply-chain, head 22c03d0df9d769ba8e60cff8b2b1e37c39775f68, base main). Ready for orchestrator review/merge.

Fix roundtrip for CI red (run 29101736874): RUSTSEC-2026-0185 closed by cargo update -p quinn-proto, 0.11.14 -> 0.11.16 (advisory requires >=0.11.15). Lockfile-only commit cf3656dda3b12ad0c03ea5154150ed2b23658669 pushed to claude/ma-6-supply-chain (PR #39), push verified equal to origin. Evidence: Cargo.lock now pins quinn-proto 0.11.16 (reverse chain reqwest -> quinn -> quinn-proto; cargo tree -i is target-gated so verified via lockfile grep); cargo check --workspace exit 0, sole warning is falcon-agent's planted unused-import (G-1, untouched). RUSTSEC-2026-0190 (anyhow warning, non-failing) left alone per orchestrator instruction. Policy consistent with npm side: fixable high => upgrade, never allowlist.

PR #39 green at cf3656d (Rust 1m5s, TS 1m43s, mergeable CLEAN). Auto-merge denied by session permission layer (self-authored PR needs human approval) — ticket holds at review per downgraded merge policy; operator merges.
Merged via operator-authorized merge train (PR #39, merge commit 44c1d28, CI green verified pre-merge).
